title: New Feature
text: Add one feature to your product — pick from your idea pool or type your own.

strategy.summary: Commit a concrete feature; it ships on this turn's build.
strategy.bestWhen: You have an idea worth shipping (from User Feedback or your own).
strategy.tradeoff: Costs a credit and a card slot, but features are the main way to score.
strategy.tableUse: Your core scoring card — features only enter the product through it.

zh.title: 新功能
zh.text: 为产品添加一个功能——从你的灵感池中选择，或自行输入。

strategy.summary: 确定一个具体功能，它会在本回合构建时交付。
strategy.bestWhen: 当你有值得交付的点子时（来自用户反馈或你自己）。
strategy.tradeoff: 需要一点数和一张手牌，但功能是主要得分来源。
strategy.tableUse: 你的核心得分牌——功能只能通过它进入产品。

title: User Feedback
text: Improve quality and market pull, then fix onboarding friction.

strategy.summary: Use customer signal to improve the product rather than adding random scope.
strategy.bestWhen: Your market score is lagging or the product needs onboarding polish.
strategy.tradeoff: It helps quality and market pull but does not directly add speed.
strategy.tableUse: A reliable mid-game card when you need both usability and credibility.

zh.title: 用户反馈
zh.text: 提升质量与市场吸引力，并修复上手摩擦。

strategy.summary: 用客户信号改进产品，而不是盲目加需求。
strategy.bestWhen: 市场分落后，或产品需要更顺滑的上手体验时使用。
strategy.tradeoff: 提升质量和市场吸引力，但不会直接增加速度。
strategy.tableUse: 中期稳定牌，适合同时补可用性和可信度。

title: Acquire Feature
text: Pay another player and adapt one of their shipped features.

strategy.summary: Buy a proven idea instead of inventing every feature yourself.
strategy.bestWhen: Another product has shipped a feature that fits your roadmap.
strategy.tradeoff: It costs credits and rewards the target with earned credits.
strategy.tableUse: Best when adaptation gives you more value than the payment gives your opponent.

zh.title: 收购功能
zh.text: 付费给另一位玩家，并改用其已交付的一个功能。

strategy.summary: 购买成熟的点子，而不是自己发明每个功能。
strategy.bestWhen: 另一位玩家已经交付了适合你路线图的功能时使用。
strategy.tradeoff: 你要花费点数，同时也会让目标玩家获得收入。
strategy.tableUse: 当改造该功能带来的价值高于付款给对手的收益时最划算。

title: Consultant
text: Offer another player a paid consult. If they accept, they pay you credits and you add a feature idea to their product.

strategy.summary: Sell your expertise to a rival for credits.
strategy.bestWhen: A player can spare the credits and would value a fresh feature idea.
strategy.tradeoff: They only pay (and get a feature) if they accept; if they decline, nothing happens.
strategy.tableUse: Best against a player with credits to spare who will take the deal.

zh.title: 顾问
zh.text: 向另一位玩家提供有偿咨询。若对方接受，他们付你点数，你则为其产品添加一个功能点子。

strategy.summary: 把你的专业能力卖给对手，换取点数。
strategy.bestWhen: 当对方付得起点数、又乐意获得一个新功能点子时使用。
strategy.tradeoff: 对方接受才会付费并获得功能；若拒绝，则什么都不会发生。
strategy.tableUse: 面对有富余点数、愿意成交的玩家时最划算。

title: Cloud Credits
text: Gain sponsored credits for future automatic builds.

strategy.summary: Increase your usable AI budget without raising your personal cap.
strategy.bestWhen: You need more build funding but want to preserve personal spend.
strategy.tradeoff: It does not improve the product until you spend those credits.
strategy.tableUse: Best before a high-output turn or when cost pressure is coming.

zh.title: 云额度
zh.text: 为后续自动构建获得赞助点数。

strategy.summary: 在不提高个人上限的情况下增加可用 AI 预算。
strategy.bestWhen: 你需要更多构建资金，但想保留个人点数上限时使用。
strategy.tradeoff: 它本身不会改进产品，只有在后续回合消耗点数时才会产生效果。
strategy.tableUse: 适合在高产出回合之前，或成本压力回合即将到来时使用。
